headline: Z.ai released GLM-5.2, a 753B-parameter text-only open weights model that tops the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index.
body: GLM-5.2 leads with a Mixture of Experts design carrying 40 active parameters and a 1 million token context window, ranking first on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index and second on Code Arena WebDev, though it emits notably more output tokens than peers. Talent rotation continues as Noam Shazeer joins OpenAI and Meta's head of product for its 'AI for work' transformation departs. On the technique side, a cluster of breakouts spans continual pretraining, generative models, and probabilistic methods including MCMC and uncertainty quantification, while policy friction surfaces around Anthropic's operational curbs in India and a French call for democracies to share advanced AI and coordinate regulation.

cited_items.title: GLM-5.2 is probably the most powerful text-only open weights LLM
Meta head of product for 'AI for work' transformation is leaving company
Inside India newsletter: Anthropic curbs ignite AI debate in India — efforts 'too slow, way too small' - CNBC
French president urges US to share cutting-edge AI and democracies to cooperate on regulation - AP News
